title: Software Engineer
description:
**About Sinch** 




 Sinch is pioneering the way the world communicates. More than 150,000 businesses - including Google, Uber, PayPal, Visa, Tinder, and many others - rely on Sinch's Customer Communications Cloud to power engaging customer experiences through mobile messaging, voice, and email.
 



 Whether you need to verify users or craft omnichannel campaigns, Sinch makes it easy. Our AI-infused Super Network, APIs, and applications ensure you can connect with your customers reliably and securely at every step of their journey.
 



 At Sinch, we Dream Big, Win Together, Keep It Simple, and Make It Happen. These values are our foundation.
 



**Essence of the Role** 




 The Shield team is building the next generation of KYC and customer trust tools within Sinch's platform domain. Our mission is to be the go-to team for customer trust evaluation across the company.
 



 We build APIs and event-driven services that support product teams and internal stakeholders. We are responsible for maintaining trusted customer records and making that data securely available across Sinch.
 



**As our new Software Engineer, you will** 



* Play a key role in designing, building, testing, and operating services used across Sinch
* Enforce security best practices, including authentication and authorization
* Contribute to tools, documentation, and internal developer support that make it easier for teams to build on our platform
* Own features throughout the full development lifecycle - from ideation to production - in a "you build it, you run it" environment
* Collaborate within a cross-functional team (engineering, product, and design) to deliver platform solutions for the wider Sinch organization



**Requirements** 




 You are a product-minded engineer who is passionate about building robust, scalable, and secure infrastructure that empowers developers and delights customers. You have a strong sense of ownership and thrive in a collaborative, fast-paced environment where your work has meaningful impact.
 



**You should have:** 



* Professional experience building and operating production backend systems
* Strong interest in system design, high availability, and distributed systems
* Solid programming experience with technologies such as Java, Kotlin, Spring, MySQL/PostgreSQL, and Kafka
* Hands-on experience with container technologies (Docker, Kubernetes)
* Experience with performance tuning and observability tools (e.g., Grafana, Datadog)



**It's a plus if you also have:** 



* Experience working at a product-focused company, with an understanding of how engineering drives customer experience
* Frontend experience (e.g., TypeScript, React) and comfort working full-stack
* Experience with performance, load, and reliability testing



**Our Hiring Process** 




 We are committed to a recruitment process that is fair, objective, consistent, and inclusive. Our process includes structured, competency-based interviews designed to evaluate your skills and experience relevant to the role. In some cases, we may include a data-driven assessment to help identify candidates who are likely to thrive at Sinch.
 



 We see hiring as a two-way conversation and encourage you to ask questions throughout the process. If this role isn't the right fit, we invite you to explore other opportunities on our careers page. No matter who you are, we hope you find an exciting path forward - hopefully with us!

title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
**About Us**
 Legora is on a mission: to redefine how legal work gets done. From the very start we have been very clear about the fact that we are not building a solution for lawyers, we are building it with them, because it is the only way to make sure it gets done the right way; working side-by-side every step of the way.
   

  

 Our AI-native workspace empowers legal professionals not just to work faster - but to ask better questions, unlock new insights. Every day, we push the boundaries of legal tech to make complex processes smarter, faster, and more human. From thousands of documents analysed in minutes to intelligent workflows designed in collaboration with leading practices, we’re turning possibility into reality.
   

  

 Today we are trusted by global firms like Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Bird & Bird and Linklaters in over 40 countries, but we have no plans on stopping here. We ship fast, we iterate effectively, and we scale rapidly - not by accident, but by design.
   

  

 When you join Legora, you become part of a team that believes "good enough" isn’t good enough and that the way to win is together, by empowering lawyers to do their best work with technology that truly understands them. If you’re excited by building from first principles, working with exceptional people, and accelerating change in a high-stakes, high-impact domain—then this is the moment and the place.
   

  

**We’re not just shaping the future of legal tech — we’re defining it. Ready to join us in building the intelligent future of law?**
**The role**
 As a Senior Software Engineer at Legora you will build, review and ship amazing products helping legal professionals all over the world in their day-to-day job. You’ll get the chance to work across the entire tech stack with clear ownership and autonomy.
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing**
* Architect and implement features end-to-end for our web platform
* Take ownership of our codebase, balancing high-quality code, security and speed of development
* Work with technologies such as React, Node.js, AWS, Azure and Kubernetes
* Review code and mentor junior colleagues to support them in their development, making the team even better!
* Drive continuous improvement and challenge us, the industry and yourself


**Who You Are**
* A passionate engineer with a several years of experience building great products using cutting-edge technologies
* You feel comfortable working across the entire tech stack, with focus on backend development
* You’re autonomous and take pride in the code you write
* You’re a problem solver who’s not afraid to come up with creative solutions and think holistically about software architecture
* Someone who enjoys being in the office 5 days a week. A key component of Legora’s success has been in-person collaboration and we want you to be part of that.
* Experience in infrastructure and integrations are a big plus


**Legora is an Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Legora, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

title: Utvecklare inom mobila lösningar
description:
Beskrivning av tjänsten
   

  

 Vill du vara med och utveckla nästa generations mobilapplikationer – och samtidigt skapa verklig nytta för några av Sveriges mest spännande företag inom industri, transport och bygg? Då är CGI rätt arbetsplats för dig!
   

  

 Hos oss på CGI får du arbeta i teknikens framkant när det gäller kompetensutveckling och ny teknik – för att kunna stötta våra kunder i den digitala transformationens snabba förändringstakt.
   

  

 Dina framtida arbetsuppgifter
   

  

 Som utvecklare av mobila lösningar blir du en viktig del av ett team som designar, utvecklar och förvaltar mobilapplikationer för både iOS och Android. Du arbetar nära UX/UI-designers, backend-utvecklare och produktägare för att skapa användarvänliga, prestandaeffektiva och säkra applikationer – ofta i projekt som påverkar stora delar av våra kunders verksamheter.
   

  

 Hos oss får du:
   

  

* Arbeta med både native (Swift, SwiftUI, Java) och cross-plattform-lösningar (.NET MAUI, hybridappar).
* Samarbeta tvärfunktionellt med UX/UI-designers, backend-utvecklare och produktägare.
* Hantera publicering till App Store och Google Play.
* Delta i DevOps-arbete och bidra till CI/CD-pipelines för mobila applikationer.
* Säkerställa hög kodkvalitet och en trygg användarupplevelse genom testdriven utveckling.


 Kvalifikationer för att bli framgångsrik denna roll
   

  

 Vi tror att du har minst fyra års erfarenhet av mobilutveckling, men viktigast är din vilja att lära, dela kunskap och ta ansvar för helheten, från idé till slutprodukt.
   

  

 Du har även:
   

  

* Erfarenhet av minst en mobilplattform (iOS, Android eller cross-plattform).
* Kunskap om RESTful API, databaser (SQL, NoSQL), och Azure.
* Förståelse för säkerhet i mobilappar (OAuth, JWT, användardata).
* Vana vid arkitekturmönster som MVVM och Clean Architecture.
* Erfarenhet av agila metoder (Scrum, Agile).


 För att trivas och lyckas i rollen tror vi att du drivs av att skapa lösningar med hög kvalitet och stark användarupplevelse. Du har en naturlig nyfikenhet på ny teknik och ett genuint intresse för att förstå användarnas behov. Du arbetar självständigt men uppskattar det agila samarbetet med kollegor, där kunskapsdelning och gemensamt ansvar för resultatet är en självklarhet. Du tycker om att bidra till teamets utveckling, coacha andra och vara en aktiv del i tekniska beslut.
   

  

 I rollen har du möjlighet att arbeta både in-house och hos kund, beroende på projekt.
   

  

 Vill du vara med och skapa digitala lösningar som gör verklig skillnad – i en miljö där du får växa, påverka och trivas? Välkommen till CGI!
   

  

**Vill du veta mer?**
 Vi ser fram emot att höra från dig! Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande så skicka in din ansökan redan i dag! Om du har frågor om rollen, hör gärna av dig till rekryterande ledare Annika Widell, Director Consulting Services/ Konsultchef, på annika.widell@cgi.com
   

  

**Låt oss som ägare omvandla verklig insikt till handling – tillsammans.**
 Livet på CGI bygger på ägande, lagarbete, respekt och tillhörighet. Tillsammans med oss kommer du att kunna nå din fulla potential.
   

  

 Du är inbjuden att ta ägandeskap redan från första dagen i vårt arbete med att förverkliga vår dröm om att skapa en arbetsmiljö där vi trivs med att arbeta tillsammans och bidrar till framgången för vårt företag. Det är därför vi kallar oss CGI Partners snarare än anställda. Vi drar nytta av vår kollektiva framgång och tillsammans får vi möjlighet att aktivt forma vår företagsstrategi och inriktning.
   

  

 Ditt arbete skapar värde. Du kommer att vara med att utveckla innovativa lösningar och bygga relationer med medarbetare och kunder samtidigt som du får tillgång till globala möjligheter att skala upp dina idéer, omfamna nya möjligheter och dra nytta av gedigen bransch- och teknikexpertis.
   

  

 Du kommer att forma din karriär tillsammans med ett företag som är byggt för att växa och bestå. Du får stöd av ledare som bryr sig om din hälsa och ditt välbefinnande och ger dig möjligheter att fördjupa dina kunskaper och vidga dina vyer.
   

  

 Bli en del en av världens största leverantörer av IT- och affärskonsulttjänster.

title: Senior Engineering Manager - Platform Metal | Sweden | Remote
description:
Grafana Labs is a remote-first, open-source powerhouse. There are more than 20M users of Grafana, the open source visualization tool, around the globe, monitoring everything from beehives to climate change in the Alps. The instantly recognizable dashboards have been spotted everywhere from a NASA launch and Minecraft HQ to Wimbledon and the Tour de France. Grafana Labs also helps more than 3,000 companies -- including Bloomberg, JPMorgan Chase, and eBay -- manage their observability strategies with the Grafana LGTM Stack, which can be run fully managed with Grafana Cloud or self-managed with the Grafana Enterprise Stack, both featuring scalable metrics (Grafana Mimir), logs (Grafana Loki), and traces (Grafana Tempo).
   

  

 We’re scaling fast and staying true to what makes us different: an open-source legacy, a global collaborative culture, and a passion for meaningful work. Our team thrives in an innovation-driven environment where transparency, autonomy, and trust fuel everything we do.
   

  

 You may not meet every requirement, and that’s okay. If this role excites you, we’d love you to raise your hand for what could be a truly career-defining opportunity.
   

  

 This is a remote position. We are considering candidates in Germany, Sweden, Spain, Ireland and the UK only.
   

  

 Senior Engineering Manager - Platform Metal
   

  

**The Opportunity**
**About our Platform:**
 Grafana Cloud moves millions of metrics, log lines, and traces per second from our customers' environments into a highly available, low-latency stack that processes and stores this data, and serves them to dashboards and alerting tools. We aim to grow this to hundreds of millions per second, and it's critical that as we grow, we improve our performance, increase our reliability, and, of course, do it efficiently and effectively.
   

  

 The Internal Engineering Platform (IEP) delivered by the Platform group provides application engineers with the tools, systems and Kubernetes clusters they need to build, deploy and run their workloads.
   

  

 We are hiring a manager as part of the creation of a new Platform “Metal” squad. This squad will be responsible for building and provisioning resources including storage, networking and Kubernetes clusters in new environments, starting with our own physical hardware. They will provide a Kubernetes control plane and underlying resources, outside public Cloud, to the rest of Engineering.
   

  

**What You'll Be Doing**
* Hire, manage, and develop a team of engineers, providing regular feedback and supporting each person’s growth through career conversations.
* Collaborate closely with product, design, and engineering leadership to define goals that move the squad forward and align with broader business objectives.
* Provide guidance throughout the project lifecycle from early ideation through planning, execution, and post‑launch, guiding the team to deliver high‑quality results consistently.
* Foster a psychologically safe environment where engineers can learn, experiment, and iterate quickly, encouraging innovation and a culture of continuous improvement.
* Work across team boundaries by contributing to projects outside your team’s scope and partnering with other functions to solve customer problems.


 We invest heavily in developer productivity. You can use modern AI coding assistants as part of your daily workflow (your choice of tools, within security guidelines), backed by a company-funded usage budget so you can iterate quickly without unnecessary friction.
   

  

 We encourage pragmatic AI-assisted development: faster prototyping, test generation, refactors, documentation, and incident follow-ups—always paired with strong code review and quality standards.
   

  

 You’ll also have access to frontier models (e.g., GPT-Codex 5/3, Claude Opus 4.6, Gemini 3 Pro).
   

  

**What Makes You a Great Fit**
* Demonstrable experience building and managing on-prem/bare metal environments
* A motivated self-starter with a strong bias toward action and ownership, able to navigate ambiguity and drive work forward in complex problem spaces.
* Comfortable collaborating across time zones and cultures in a fully remote environment, using clear, empathetic communication to build trust, connection, and psychological safety.
* Experienced in guiding and supporting other engineers, leading initiatives or small teams, and collaborating effectively to drive projects to successful outcomes.
* Demonstrated ability to manage complexity, align stakeholders, and elevate team performance to deliver meaningful, high-quality results.
* Deeply customer-focused, consistently grounding decisions and technical choices in user needs and real-world impact.
* Solid understanding of distributed systems principles, including scalability, fault tolerance, consistency, production-readiness, and observability.
* Comfort with AI-assisted tooling. We embrace AI and agentic development, so we expect you to be curious and comfortable using AI-powered tools and ideally have practical experience folding them into a team’s workflow.


**Bonus Points For**
* Running Kubernetes and/or Ceph in production environments
* Experience dealing with colo facilities and associated vendors
* You’ve worked in or on open source, or other community-based projects previously. At Grafana Labs, “OSS is in our DNA”


**In Sweden, the Base compensation range for this role is SEK 949,000 - SEK 1,246,000. Actual compensation may vary based on level, experience, and skillset as assessed throughout the interview process. All of our roles include Restricted Stock Units (RSUs), giving every team member ownership in Grafana Labs' success. We believe in shared outcomes—RSUs help us stay aligned and invested as we scale globally.**
* Compensation ranges are country specific. If you are applying for this role from a different location than listed above, your recruiter will discuss your specific market’s defined pay range & benefits at the beginning of the process.


**Why You’ll Thrive At Grafana Labs**
* 100% Remote, Global Culture - As a remote-only company, we bring together talent from around the world, united by a culture of collaboration and shared purpose.
* Scaling Organization – Tackle meaningful work in a high-growth, ever-evolving environment.
* Transparent Communication – Expect open decision-making and regular company-wide updates.
* Innovation-Driven – Autonomy and support to ship great work and try new things.
* Open Source Roots – Built on community-driven values that shape how we work.
* Empowered Teams – High trust, low ego culture that values outcomes over optics.
* Career Growth Pathways – Defined opportunities to grow and develop your career.
* Approachable Leadership – Transparent execs who are involved, visible, and human.
* Passionate People – Join a team of smart, supportive folks who care deeply about what they do.
* In-Person onboarding - We want you to thrive from day 1 with your fellow new ‘Grafanistas’ to learn all about what we do and how we do it.
* Balance is Key - We operate a global annual leave policy of 30 days per annum. 3 days of your annual leave entitlement are reserved for Grafana Shutdown Days to allow the team to really disconnect. \*We will comply with local legislation where applicable.


**Equal Opportunity Employer:** 
 We will recruit, train, compensate and promote regardless of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, disability, age, veteran status, and all the other fascinating characteristics that make us different and unique. We believe that equality and diversity builds a strong organization and we’re working hard to make sure that’s the foundation of our organization as we grow.
   

  

*Grafana Labs may utilize AI tools in its recruitment process to assist in matching information provided in CVs to job postings. The recruitment team will continue to review inbound CVs manually to identify alignment with current openings.*
*For information about how your personal data is used once you’ve applied to a job, check out our privacy policy.*

title: Infrastructure Platform Engineer
description:
**About The Team**
 Our mission is to make client development fast, easy, and delightful. We own the tools and infrastructure that developers interact with every day—from command-line interfaces to automation integrations to the Golden Path that guides engineers through their development journey.
   

  

 We care deeply about developer productivity. Every friction point we eliminate, every second we shave off a workflow, multiplies across thousands of engineers and millions of lines of code.
   

  

**Role Overview**
 We're looking for an Infrastructure Platform Engineer to help us build and maintain the foundational systems that power developer workflows. You'll work on CLI tooling, automation infrastructure, linting platforms, and integrations that thousands of engineers rely on daily.
   

  

 This is a hands-on role, you’ll be building new systems, debugging older ones, and collaborating closely with other teams across the company. You'll gain exposure to a wide range of technologies and domains while developing deep expertise in developer tooling and infrastructure.
   

  

**Main Responsibilities**
* Design, build, and maintain infrastructure and platform tooling that supports developer workflows.
* Collaborate with a cross-functional team to enhance and streamline the developer experience.
* Contribute to the standardization and automation of development workflows across various platforms.
* Monitor, troubleshoot, and improve system reliability and performance.
* Engage in continuous improvement practices to identify and address pain points in our infrastructure.
* Participate in supporting developers through our support channels.


**Key Requirements**
* Experience with infrastructure, platform engineering, or developer tooling.
* Ability to work effectively with AI tools.
* Proficiency in scripting and automation (Python, Bash, or similar).
* Comfortable working in the command line.
* Experience with CI/CD systems or build tooling.
* Curiosity about how things work and a drive to improve them.
* Strong problem-solving skills and a proactive attitude towards learning.
* Ability to work collaboratively in a team-oriented environment.
* Excellent communication skills to effectively collaborate with various stakeholders.


**Nice to Have**
* Experience with Bazel or similar build systems.
* Background in mobile (iOS/Android), web, or backend development.
* Experience with monorepo tooling and workflows.
* Experience with infrastructure-as-code tools.


**Other Details**
 Start: April until December 2026.
   

  

 Workplace: Sweden.

title: Power Platform-utvecklare
description:
**Vill du automatisera processer som andra fortfarande gör manuellt? Då vill vi prata med dig!**
 Som
 **Power Platform-utvecklare** 
 på B3 Cloud arbetar du med att designa, utveckla och förvalta lösningar inom Microsoft Power Platform i nära samarbete med våra kunder. Du bidrar till att skapa effektiva, säkra och användarvänliga applikationer som stödjer verksamhetens processer och digitala utveckling.
   

  

*Du kommer bland annat:*
* Utveckla och förvalta lösningar inom Power Platform, inklusive Power Apps, Power Automate och Dataverse
* Integrera Power Platform lösningar med andra system inom Microsoft 365 och Azure
* Ta fram design av datamodeller och lösningsarkitektur för nya och befintliga lösningar
* Utveckla och implementera API-baserade integrationer för att koppla samman olika system och tjänster
* Införa och förvalta ärendessystem och digitala arbetsflöden baserade på Power Platform och Microsoft 365


*Vi söker dig som:*
* Har minst 5 års erfarenhet av utveckling inom Power Platform
* Innehar goda kunskaper inom Power Apps, Power Automate och Dataverse
* Har erfarenhet av Azure-tjänster såsom Logic apps, Azure functions och API Management
* Är van vid att arbete med integrationer och API:er
* Har god förståelse för informationssäkerhet, behörighetsstyrning och datamodellering
* Är strukturerad, analytisk och lösningsorienterad
* Kan flytande svenska i tal och skrift då det krävs i det dagliga arbetet


**Vilka är vi?**
 Vi är B3 Cloud, ett härligt gäng med specialistkunskaper inom molntjänster utspridda i Göteborg och Stockholm. Vi tror på att dela kunskap, stötta varandra och ständigt utvecklas tillsammans – både som team och som individer.
   

  

 Som en del av B3 Consulting Group har vi resurser, kompetens och stöd i ryggen samtidigt som vi bibehåller dynamik och flexibilitet med korta beslutsvägar. Vi är stolt över att vara del av en verksamhet som präglas av inkludering och en strävan efter att ha en positiv påverkan på samhället, människor och miljön. Vi värdesätter olikheter och erfarenheter och arbetar kontinuerligt med inkludering och kultur för samarbete och respekt.
   

  

*Vi erbjuder:*
* Frihet och flexibilitet att påverka din utveckling, arbetstider och uppdrag
* Kompetensutveckling genom utbildningar, certifieringar och lunchföreläsningar
* Konkurrenskraftig lönemodell och en otroligt flexibel samt förmånlig RAM modell.
* En givande företagskultur med konferensresor, AW:s och wellness-aktiviteter

title: Saviynt EIC
description:
Saviynt EIC
 



  





 My client is looking for
 **IAM Saviynt Consultant** 
 , and I wanted to know whether this would be of interest to you or not?
 



  





**Position: IAM Saviynt Consultant** 




**Location: Stockholm, Sweden (Hybrid)** 




**Duration: 6+ months contract** 




  





**Role Description:** 



* Designing and implementing Saviynt EIC configurations and workflows.
* The role involves developing and maintaining Saviynt connectors for various systems and applications.
* Building and optimizing access request forms and automated provisioning logic is essential.
* Troubleshooting platform-level and connector issues is a critical part of the job.
* The developer will also create custom tasks and job schedulers.



  





**Essential Skills:** 



* Good to have knowledge of Microsoft Entra ID and Active Directory.
* Understanding of federation and SSO concepts like OAuth2, SAML, and OIDC is beneficial.
* Experience with governance models and credential security is a plus.
* Familiarity with certification campaigns and policy controls can enhance the candidates profile.
* Experience in a global work environment is advantageous.
* Must have experience with Saviynt EIC and a strong understanding of IAM concepts.
* Proficiency in programming/scripting languages such as JavaScript, PowerShell, and Python is essential.
* Familiarity with REST API integrations and non-human identity lifecycles is also required.
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills are crucial for troubleshooting and resolving issues.
* Clear communication skills with both technical and non-technical stakeholders are necessary.

title: Data Engineer
description:
På Fortnox är data hjärtat i vår förmåga att hjälpa företag starta, växa och utvecklas. Vi befinner oss i ett expansivt skede där vi bygger framtidens dataplattform: en cloud miljö som hanterar transaktionsdata från över en halv miljon svenska företag, processar miljontals händelser per minut, och omvandlar denna massiva datamängd till handlingsbara insikter, avancerad AI och analyslösningar för en utvecklingsorganisation med över 50 team.
   

  

 Nu söker vi en
 **Data Engineer** 
 som inte bara vill utveckla och optimera pipelines, utan som vill vara med och designa hur vår dataarkitektur ska se ut imorgon
 **.** 
 Du kommer spela en nyckelroll i att säkerställa att vår data är välstrukturerad, lättillgänglig och redo att driva både affärsbeslut och nya innovationer.
   

  

**Detta kommer du att få**
* Designa och vidareutveckla vår dataplattform och arkitektur att skala i takt med en expansiv verksamhet.
* Arbeta end-to-end med datalösningar – från strategi och planering till implementering, driftsättning och långsiktig governance.
* Utveckla och underhålla robusta data pipelines och integrationer i cloudmiljöer.
* Driva initiativ kring datasäkerhet och compliance i nära samarbete med team inom säkerhet och juridik.
* Stötta och samarbeta med Data Scientists, Analytiker och Utvecklare för att demokratisera data i hela organisationen.
* Bidra till en kultur av lärande – sprida kunskap och expertis samt påverka hur vi bygger upp vår Data & Analys-funktion.


**Vad du behöver för att anta uppdraget**
 Vi söker dig som drivs av att se data omvandlas till insikter och värde. Du gillar att ta ägandeskap och har förmågan att hantera komplexa projekt med både precision och framåtdrift i en snabbt växande organisation . Att vara en del av vårt team innebär att du driver förändring där det behövs, både i vår infrastruktur och i våra arbetssätt.
   

  

**Vi tror att du har:**
* 3-5 års relevant erfarenhet i rollen som Data Engineer eller liknande.
* Mycket goda kunskaper i Python eller SQL.
* Gedigen erfarenhet av datainfrastruktur och arkitektur i cloudmiljöer (gärna GCP, men även andra är meriterande).
* Erfarenhet av verktyg och system som t.ex. DBT, Fivetran och BigQuery
* Meriterande om du har erfarenhet av att bygga integrationer mot datakällor som Postgres och Kafka.


**Som person är du:**
* Initiativrik och självgående – du ser vad som behöver göras och driver uppgifter framåt.
* Strukturerad och detaljfokuserad, men kan samtidigt tänka i nya banor och se helheten.
* Analytisk och en problemlösare med förmågan att kommunicera komplexa insikter till både tekniska och icke-tekniska stakeholders.
* Flexibel och trivs i en föränderlig miljö. Du värdesätter teambaserat arbete och bidrar till en positiv, lärande kultur.


**Vi erbjuder dig:**
* Möjlighet till stor påverkan på Fortnox uppföljning och hur vi bygger vår dataplattform i en mycket expansiv fas.
* Teknisk utveckling genom att samarbeta med erfarna och kompetenta utvecklare och specialister.
* Generösa möjligheter till kompetensutveckling, som konferenser, utbildningar och tid för egenutveckling.
* Flexibelt arbete: Vi tror på flexibilitet – du kan jobba på distans eller på något av våra kontor i Växjö (huvudkontor), Malmö, Linköping eller Stockholm.


 Välkommen att vara med och forma vilka vi är imorgon.
   

  

**Välkommen med din ansökan!**

title: Tech Lead till ID06
description:
Vill du ta ett större ansvar för teknikval, arkitektur och teamets utveckling och samtidigt bidra till ett viktigt samhällsuppdrag?
   

  

 ID06 driver affärer som bidrar till att minska arbetskraftskriminalitet och fusk i Sverige. Vårt uppdrag är att främja sund konkurrens, motverka svartarbete och ekonomisk brottslighet samt bidra till schyssta villkor på arbetsmarknaden.
   

  

 Vi söker nu en Tech Lead som vill kombinera djup teknisk kompetens med ett ledande ansvar och vara med och utveckla lösningar som gör verklig skillnad för arbetsmarknaden.
   

  

 Rollen är både strategisk och operativ med stort tekniskt ansvar. Som Tech Lead hos oss får du en nyckelroll i att forma och vidareutveckla våra egenutvecklade digitala tjänster från arkitektur och design till implementation och drift.
   

  

 Du leder det tekniska arbetet i teamet, coachar kollegor och säkerställer att vi bygger robusta, säkra och skalbara lösningar i en modern molnmiljö (Microsoft Azure).
   

  

 Du arbetar nära produktägare, verksamhet och andra utvecklare för att omsätta affärsbehov till hållbara och genomtänkta tekniska lösningar.
   

  

 Rollen ger dig stort mandat att påverka teknikval, arbetssätt, processer och att vara en teknisk förebild som driver kvalitet, säkerhet och innovation framåt.
   

  

**Du kommer att:**
* Leda och coacha utvecklingsteamet i tekniska frågor och best practice samt även vara aktiv i utvecklingsarbetet
* Ansvara för systemarkitektur, designbeslut och teknisk roadmap
* Säkerställa kodkvalitet, testbarhet och stabila leveranser
* Driva teknisk förbättring, automatisering och utveckling av DevOps-processer
* Omvärldsbevaka ny teknik och initiera relevanta förbättringar
* Vara ett tekniskt bollplank till produktägare och bidra i prioritering och planering
* Delta aktivt i rekrytering och kompetensutveckling


**Därför kommer du att trivas hos oss**
 Hos oss blir du en del av en inkluderande och framåtblickande organisation där du får stort inflytande, möjlighet att växa och chansen att bidra till något som verkligen gör skillnad.
   

  

 Vi erbjuder bland annat:
   

  

* En strategisk och operativ roll med stort mandat
* Möjlighet att arbeta med hela kedjan - från idé till produktion
* En modern, molnbaserad miljö med fokus på kvalitet, säkerhet och automation
* Kompetenta och engagerade kollegor i ett öppet och prestigelöst klimat
* Kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling och stöd för certifieringar
* Moderna kontor centralt i Stockholm, Göteborg och Jönköping
* Hybrid- och distansarbete
* Kollektivavtal (ITP1), arbetstidsförkortning, sjukvårdsförsäkring och friskvårdsbidrag
* Ett bolag med en viktig roll i samhället


**Det här söker vi hos dig**
 För att lyckas i rollen har du flera års erfarenhet av systemutveckling i moderna teknologier, exempelvis .NET, Node.js, Python, Java, React och Azure.
   

  

 Vi ser att du:
   

  

* Har dokumenterad erfarenhet av att leda team, projekt eller tekniska initiativ
* Är van att ta ansvar för arkitektur, teknikval och leverans
* Har god förståelse för molnbaserad utveckling och CI/CD
* Behärskar svenska mycket väl, i tal och skrift
* Är en trygg problemlösare och kommunikativ ledare
* Trivs i tvärfunktionellt samarbete nära affären
* Har ett starkt intresse för ny teknik och att driva förbättring


**Ansökan och information**
 I denna rekrytering samarbetar ID06 med Experis IT. Vid frågor är du välkommen att kontakta ansvarig rekryteringskonsult Anki Snis på 08-508 954 53 eller via e-post: anki.snis@se.experis.com.
   

  

 Omfattning: Heltid. Vi tillämpar provanställning.
   

  

 Säkerhetskontroll genomförs före anställning.
   

  

 Intervjuer sker löpande - skicka därför gärna in din ansökan så snart som möjligt.
   

  

 Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!
   

  

**Om oss**
 ID06 utvecklar, säljer och förvaltar lösningar som säkerställer att företag och deras medarbetare har rätt att arbeta i Sverige och har lämnat korrekta uppgifter. Genom att motarbeta svartarbete, arbetslivskriminalitet och ekonomisk brottslighet bidrar vi till sund konkurrens och att alla spelar efter samma regler - i bygg- och fastighetssektorn och i andra branscher.
   

  

 ID06 AB grundades 2006 av Byggföretagen med målet att främja sund konkurrens och säkra arbetsplatser.
   

  

 Sedan starten har vårt fokus varit bygg- och fastighetsbranschen. Nu utvecklar vi våra digitala tjänster vidare och möter behov i fler branscher där kraven på kontroll av identitet, medborgarskap och rätten att arbeta i Sverige ökar.

title: Tjänstedesigner
description:
**Vi på Combitech i Stockholm söker en senior tjänstedesigner som har erfarenhet av att driva tjänstedesign i komplexa organisationer. Rollen passar dig som inte bara genomför designarbete utan också bygger metodik och nya arbetssätt som får genomslag i verksamheten.**

**Vad vi erbjuder**
-------------------


På Combitech satsar vi på våra medarbetare, de är kärnan, hjärnan och hjärtat i vår verksamhet. Det gör vi bland annat genom att satsa på din kompetensutveckling samt ger dig möjlighet att lätt kombinera jobbet med vardagen.


Som konsult hos oss får du möjlighet att arbeta i teknikens framkant tillsammans med kunder inom bland annat försvar - och fordonsindustrin.


Du får arbeta nära både kund och kollegor i uppdrag som är samhällsviktiga och långsiktiga, där tjänstedesign bidrar till ett bättre samhälle.

**Vad rollen innebär**
----------------------


I rollen som senior tjänstedesigner arbetar du i uppdrag där tjänstedesign används som ett strategiskt verktyg för att utveckla tjänster, processer och kundupplevelser. Du ansvarar självständigt för designprocessen och fungerar ofta som en sammanhållande kraft mellan verksamhet, IT, ledning och utveckling.


En central del av rollen är att sätta eller vidareutveckla arbetssätt, metoder och strukturer så att design blir en naturlig del av organisationens sätt att arbeta. Du leder designprocesser end to end, från insikt och analys till koncept, roadmap och beslutsunderlag, och är trygg i att facilitera workshops och arbeta tillsammans med chefer och andra nyckelintressenter.


Det är meriterande om du även har UX-kompetens och kan ta arbetet vidare i interaktionsdesign, flöden och koncept i nära samarbete med utveckling.

**Vad vi söker**
----------------


Vi söker dig som har minst fem års erfarenhet av tjänstedesign på senior nivå och som är van att driva uppdrag självständigt med fullt ansvar för leverans. Du har erfarenhet av att sätta metodik och införa nya arbetssätt, och kan översätta användarbehov till tydliga vägval och prioriteringar.


Du trivs i en rådgivande roll nära kund och är trygg i att leda och facilitera designprocesser i komplexa sammanhang.


Meriterande är även om du har UX-kompetens och erfarenhet av digital tjänsteutvecklin, erfarenhet från komplexa eller samhällsviktiga verksamheter samt erfarenhet av att coacha andra i tjänstedesign och användarcentrerat arbetssätt.

**Då tjänsten innebär arbete som omfattas av försvarssekretess krävs det att du genomför och godkänns i en säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll.**

**Urval sker löpande. Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!**

**Kontaktperson**  

Therese Elwing: therese.elwing@combitech.com


Vi har tyvärr inte möjlighet att ta emot LIA och undanber oss rekryteringssamarbeten.

title: UX/UI Designer Intern
description:
**UX/UI Designer Intern — Remote | XR Solutions** 




  





**Who we are** 
 XR Solutions provides augmented reality solutions for industrial operations — from AR-guided maintenance and troubleshooting to real-time remote support on factory floors. We work with companies across pharmaceuticals, automotive, steel manufacturing, mining, and more. Our platform helps reduce unplanned downtime, increase operational efficiency, and give businesses full control over their activities.
 



  





 We're growing, and we need a designer to help shape what that experience looks like through XR glasses.
 



  





**The role** 
 You'll own the UX/UI design for our head-mounted XR glasses platform — the interface that puts step-by-step instructions, live AR calls, and real-time operational data directly in a technician's field of view. From user research to final delivery, you'll lead the design process and work closely with our product team.
 



  





 This starts remote, with the option to go hybrid later. The honest details: this is an unpaid internship. Strong work leads to a paid role. We make sure the experience is worth your time — real product, real users, real mentorship.
 



  





**What you'd do** 



* Lead the design process end to end — research, workshops, ideation, prototypes, delivery
* Design spatial interfaces for XR glasses — hand tracking, eye tracking, voice interaction
* Conduct user interviews and usability tests with industrial users
* Build and maintain design systems in Figma
* Collaborate with developers in Unity to bring designs into production



  





**What we're looking for** 




 3+ years working in Figma — real fluency, not surface-level use.
 



 2+ years building and maintaining design systems.
 



 AR or spatial design experience (1+ year) is a strong plus.
 



 You're independent, detail-oriented, and comfortable making design decisions without a playbook.
 



  





 Show us a portfolio with process, not just finished screens.
 



  





**What you'd walk away with** 
 Hands-on design experience on a live AR platform used across heavy industries. Spatial UI work that most designers don't get access to this early. And if things go well — a job.
 



  





**Interested?** 
 Send us your CV. We'd love to hear from you.

title: Anaplan Solution Architect
description:
Spaulding Ridge is an advisory and IT implementation firm. We help global organizations get financial clarity into the complex, daily sales, and operational decisions that impact profitable revenue generations, efficient operational performance, and reliable financial management.
   

  

 At Spaulding Ridge, we believe all business is personal. Core to our values is our relationships with our clients, our business partners, our team, and the global community. Our employees dedicate their time to helping our clients transform their business, from strategy through implementation and business transformation.
   

  

 We are looking for an experienced
 **Anaplan Solution Architect** 
 to join our
 **Anaplan Delivery** 
 team in Europe.
   

  

**The role**
 The Anaplan Solution Architect will design best-in-class Anaplan solutions tailored to meet the specific needs of our clients. You will develop and cast the technical vision to internal model-building consultants, and most importantly, to our clients, as we work to deliver the best possible solution to their challenges. Your design will account for data sources, integration layers, the underlying Anaplan model architecture, and the user interface, and you will have the opportunity to coach and train others along the way!
   

  

* Work as a Solutions Architect and lead the end-to-end design of an Anaplan Model
* Run a project utilising the Agile Implementation Methodology
* Teach both clients and internal teams with no prior Anaplan knowledge how to build a model.
* Guide a customer to enhance their process utilising both Anaplan expertise and Subject Matter Expertise.
* Have difficult conversations with a customer about scope and timeline to ensure the project timeline is on track and the budget
* Effectively lead a team of consultants


**You have:**
* Sound experience in Consulting or Financial Reporting, and Analysis
* Strong knowledge of Excel. Including an understanding of how to develop macros, and model large data sets utilising Lookups and SumIf functions.
* Microsoft Office Suite expertise
* Strong understanding of Multi-Dimensional data architecture and data integration
* Previous experience with other EPM technologies


**We take care of you!**
 As an employee of Spaulding Ridge, you will be part of a company that provides innovative opportunities to impact our clients in a meaningful way positively. We believe giving back is core to our values and as part of this effort, you will be given the opportunity to participate in different opportunities throughout the year, including SR’s day of service, giving back to our global community.
   

  

**Please note we are unable to offer visa sponsorship for this role.**
**Spaulding Ridge’s Commitment to an Inclusive Workplace**
 When we engage the expertise, insights, and creativity of people from all walks of life, we become a better organization, we deliver superior services to clients, and we transform our communities and world for the better.
   

  

 At Spaulding Ridge, we believe our team should reflect the rich diversity of society and we take seriously the responsibility to cultivate a workplace where every bandmate feels accepted, respected, and valued for who they are. We do this by creating a culture of trust and belonging, through practices and policies that support inclusion, and through our employee led Employee Resource Groups (ERGs): CRE (Cultural Race and Ethnicity), Women Elevate, PROUD and Mental Wellness Alliance.
   

  

 The company is committed to offering Equal Employment Opportunity and to providing reasonable accommodation to applicants with physical and/or mental disabilities. If you are interested in applying for employment with Spaulding Ridge and are in need of accommodation or special assistance to navigate our website or to complete your application, please send an e-mail with your request to our VP of Human Resources, Cara Halladay (challaday@spauldingridge.com). Requests for reasonable accommodation will be considered on a case-by-case basis.
   

  

 Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to their age, race, religion, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, protected veteran status or disability.

title: Data Engineer & Sr Data Engineer roles in Sweden
description:
Mission description  
We are looking for a Data Engineer for an assignment with a focus on building and maintaining scalable and reliable data foundations within the People area. The role aims to enable global reporting and analysis through high-quality and well-structured data solutions.  
In this role, you will work on extracting, processing and validating HR data using Python and SQL, and modeling data into analysis-ready structures such as star schemas and semantic layers. You will also be responsible for delivering and further developing Power BI dashboards that support the business's needs for insights and decision support.  
You will work closely with stakeholders in People & Culture as well as IT and data platform teams, such as Snowflake, to ensure clear KPI definitions, good data governance and secure access. The role entails overall responsibility for creating robust data solutions that enable data-driven decisions across the organization.  
Qualifications:  
You have higher education in a relevant field (e.g. Data/IT, computer science, engineering, statistics, mathematics) or equivalent work experience.  
You are fluent in English.  
You have strong practical experience with Python for data preparation and automation as well as SQL for extraction/transformation.  
You have solid experience in developing and maintaining Power BI solutions (data modeling, DAX, Power Query, performance, lifecycle management).  
You have an understanding of databases and data modeling; experience working with or close to cloud-based data warehouse solutions (e.g. Snowflake).  
You have experience with HR/personnel data and HR systems is an advantage.

Lön: 400,00kr - 800,00kr per timma

Arbetsort: Delvis på distans i Stockholm

title: OT & IT Systemadministratör Windows
description:
**Företagsbeskrivning**
 AFRY erbjuder tjänster inom teknik, design, digitalisering och rådgivning. Vi är hängivna experter inom industri, energi- och infrastruktur, som skapar värde för kommande generationer. AFRY har en global räckvidd med djupa rötter i Norden. Tillsammans accelererar vi omställningen till ett mer hållbart samhälle.
   

  

**Jobbeskrivning**
 Vi söker nu en engagerad OT- eller IT-systemadministratör som vill ta nästa steg i karriären genom ett utvecklande uppdrag hos en av våra kunder i södra Stor-Stockholm. Här får du möjlighet att arbeta i tekniknära miljöer där din kompetens verkligen gör skillnad men även i detta uppdrag lära dig nya tekniska områden för framtiden.
   

  

 Du blir en del av ett sammansvetsat och kompetent team från AFRY som arbetar nära kunden i vardagen där det du blir en del av teamet onsite som innefattar AFRY och kund resurser, möjlighet till flexibelt distansarbete när tillfälle ges och när det i uppdraget kan planeras. Tillsammans bidrar ni från AFRY med expertis, problemlösning och innovation i en miljö som präglas av samarbete, kunskapsutbyte och högteknologisk nivå.
   

  

**Kvalifikationer**
 Vi söker en person med omkring fem års erfarenhet som IT- eller OT-teknisk systemadministratör huvudsakligen med Windows/Microsoft erfarenheter. Du har erfarenhet av att genomföra segmentering och vara delaktig i nätverksinfrastrukturs uppdrag. Vi ser gärna att du har erfarenhet av att konfigurera switchar och brandväggar i segmenteringsarbetet samt vana att arbeta i Microsoft-plattformar, operativsystem och applikationer, det är även meriterande om du har kunskap om äldre operativsystem.
   

  

 Vi tror du har en högskoleexamen inom IT eller teknik, alternativt en YH-utbildning inom likvärdigt område eller motsvarande kompetens som vi utvärderar, men du är i början på din tekniska karriär. Erfarenhet av säkerhet, säkerhetskopiering och katastrofåterställning är meriterande, liksom arbete med livscykelhantering (LCM) och applikationsanalys. Det är även positivt med kännedom om och erfarenhet från produktionsmiljöer, exempelvis gruvor eller fabriker.
   

  

 Du kommer tillhöra Solna kontoret men pendling ingår i tjänsten.
   

  

**Säkerhetsprövning & Utbildningsverifiering**
 Svenskt medborgarskap kan krävas för vissa befattningar. Säkerhetsprövning och bakgrundskontroller är obligatoriska för försvarsrelaterade roller. Vi genomför även utbildningsverifiering inför anställning.
   

  

**Ytterligare information**
 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!
   

  

 Sista ansökningsdag är 20 april 2026. Urval och intervjuer sker löpande.
   

  

**Kontaktperson för frågor:**
 Michael Blom, michael.blom@afry.com
   

  

 Senior Advisor OT & IT Säkerhet
   

  

 Lina Wallensten, lina.wallensten@afry.com
   

  

 Section Area Manager OT & IT säkerhet
   

  

 Ellinor Danielsson, ellinor.danielsson@afry.com
   

  

 Rekryteringspartner AFRY
   

  

*Vi undanber oss direktkontakt med bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag samt säljare av ytterligare jobbannonser.*
*På AFRY driver vi förändring i allt vi gör. Vi anser att förändring sker när modiga idéer möts, när vi samarbetar, skapar innovation och omfamnar kreativa lösningar, det är så vi skapar framtiden. Vi söker konstant kvalificerade kandidater som vill ansluta sig till våra inkluderande team runt om i världen. Bli en del av oss och påskynda den gröna omställningen*

title: Counsel, Intellectual Property - Nordics
description:
Netflix is one of the world's leading entertainment services, with over 300 million paid memberships in over 190 countries enjoying TV series, films and games across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time.
   

  

 A newly established role, Netflix seeks an experienced intellectual property lawyer to provide legal support for its content and business across the Nordics.
   

  

 This role will closely collaborate with the creative, business and legal teams that create Netflix’s great content and includes advising film and television productions and executives on all matters related to intellectual property and production clearance issues across the Nordics.
   

  

 You will identify and manage IP-related risks in content, including trademark, copyright, defamation and similar, and communicate them to relevant stakeholders. You will work alongside the business and legal affairs teams to acquire and develop IP, guiding it through production and distribution. This includes conducting a chain of title research, advising on title and production clearance, IP enforcement, pre-litigation claim defence, collaborating with our litigation team on IP litigation matters, negotiating and drafting agreements for a wide variety of production materials.
   

  

 Your experience enables you to work across any, sometimes last-minute situations, that may be encountered related to a production. You can navigate those situations while allowing your colleagues to fulfil their creative and business goals. You understand the dynamics among producers, executive producers, line producers, production departments, marketing and creative, and know when and how to align the appropriate teams when an IP issue arises. You have experience evaluating risk with imperfect information and have the confidence to make quick decisions. You are passionate about the entertainment industry and are excited to learn more.
   

  

 The role will report to the Sr. Director Business & Legal Affairs Nordics, based in Stockholm.
   

  

**Requirements**
* Extensive experience as an IP lawyer in content or entertainment-related fields (e.g., sports, advertising, tech, gaming, production, music, theatre, broadcasting, or law firms specializing in these industries).
* Production clearance experience in film, television and/or similar.
* In-depth knowledge of IP law, media, and personality rights in the Nordics and/or the rest of the EU, covering copyright, moral rights, trademarks, fair dealing, rights of publicity/privacy, defamation, and freedom of speech.
* Proven ability to manage and resolve IP disputes, handle complex copyright transactions and chain of title review, providing concise and pragmatic, business-minded solutions.
* Excellent organisational and interpersonal communication skills. Curiosity and willingness to tackle matters outside their area of expertise and delve into local business practice and law in various countries. Openness to learn and build knowledge.
* Strong analytical capabilities and judgement, including when there is no clear rule or solution from the outset.
* Ability to work proactively, independently and reliably with a solution oriented mindset, pivoting as necessary when several, simultaneous matters needing attention.
* Maintain close alignment with multiple internal cross-functional partners.
* Ability to collaborate effectively with people of diverse backgrounds.
* Fluency in English and a Nordic language is required.


 This position will be based in Stockholm, with regular travel primarily in the Nordics and Europe.
   

  

 Inclusion is a Netflix value and we strive to host a meaningful interview experience for all candidates. If you want an accommodation/adjustment for a disability or any other reason during the hiring process, please send a request to your recruiting partner.
   

  

 We are an equal-opportunity employer and celebrate diversity, recognizing that diversity builds stronger teams. We approach diversity and inclusion seriously and thoughtfully. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, ancestry, national origin, caste, sex, sexual orientation, gender, gender identity or expression, age, disability, medical condition, pregnancy, genetic makeup, marital status, or military service.

title: Full-Stack Engineer
description:
**About Us**
 Legora is on a mission: to redefine how legal work gets done. From the very start we have been very clear about the fact that we are not building a solution for lawyers, we are building it with them, because it is the only way to make sure it gets done the right way; working side-by-side every step of the way.

title: Security Engineer – Cloud Security (Azure)
description:
**Mission**
 Neko Health exists to shift healthcare from treating illness to preventing it, using advanced, non‑invasive technology and clinical expertise to deliver early, actionable health insights.
   

  

 Role Purpose
   

  

 As a Security Engineer focused on Cloud Security, you will play a key role in protecting Neko Health’s Azure environment within a regulated healthcare setting. You will design and implement robust security controls, monitor for threats, and ensure compliance while enabling teams to securely build and operate cloud infrastructure at scale.
   

  

 What You’ll Deliver in the First 6–12 Months
   

  

* Establish and enforce secure baselines across Azure infrastructure, improving overall cloud security posture and risk visibility.
* Implement and optimize Microsoft Defender for Cloud and Sentinel monitoring, strengthening threat detection and response capabilities.
* Introduce and mature policy-as-code practices for infrastructure deployments, ensuring consistent and auditable security enforcement.
* Partner with engineering and DevOps teams to embed security into infrastructure-as-code and architecture design.
* Support cloud-related incident response and produce audit-ready evidence aligned to regulatory requirements.


**Responsibilities**
* Harden and secure Azure resources including virtual machines, storage, and databases.
* Configure and monitor Microsoft Defender for Cloud and Microsoft Sentinel.
* Develop and enforce policy-as-code using Terraform and ARM templates.
* Conduct architecture reviews and threat modelling for cloud services.
* Collaborate with DevOps and engineering teams to embed security into infrastructure-as-code.
* Support incident response and maintain audit-ready security documentation.


**Minimum Qualifications**
* Hands-on experience with Azure security services including Defender for Cloud and Sentinel.
* Strong understanding of identity and access management, least privilege, and identity protection.
* Familiarity with compliance frameworks such as ISO 27001, NIST CSF, and HIPAA.
* Proficiency with Infrastructure-as-Code tools such as Terraform and ARM templates.
* Experience integrating SIEM/SOAR platforms and cloud monitoring solutions.


**About The Engineering Team**
 Distributed and Remote First
   

  

 Neko Health has nearly 100 full-time engineers working across Berlin, Chamonix, Hamburg, Lisbon, Marseille, Vilnius, and Stockholm, covering disciplines such as Hardware Engineering, Firmware Development, Electrical Design, Algorithm Development, Machine Learning, Optronics Research, and Software Engineering.
   

  

 Our technology stack includes React, TypeScript, C++, Python, and C# with ASP.NET Core. We use Azure Cosmos DB and Azure Active Directory for authentication.
   

  

 We are a Remote-First company, though some hardware and firmware roles require occasional access to physical devices. Software engineers in Stockholm typically visit the office once every one to two weeks. Teams meet in person a few times per year for collaboration and team building.
   

  

 Organization and Way of Working
   

  

 Engineering is structured into small, cross-functional teams aligned to specific goals. Some teams are long-lived while others are formed for targeted initiatives. Teams aim to operate autonomously while collaborating across the organization when needed.
   

  

 Goals are tracked quarterly and annually, with bi-weekly organization-wide progress reviews. Teams typically plan on a bi-weekly cadence but retain flexibility in how they work.
   

  

 All teams present progress, experiments, and learnings during bi-weekly engineering demos, covering topics ranging from hardware challenges and system calibration to new infrastructure, backend capabilities, and data visualization innovations that improve clinical productivity.
   

  

 Neko Health promotes a flexible workplace focused on work-life balance. We are deeply committed to our mission while believing meaningful impact should not require sacrificing personal wellbeing.
   

  

**About Titles At Neko**
 We use a simplified internal title framework that prioritises clarity over hierarchy, so internal titles may differ from market‑facing role titles. Scope, impact and level of the role are fully aligned and will be clearly discussed throughout the process.
   

  

**Hiring Process**
 Candidates progress from application and structured screening through thoughtfully designed interviews culminating in a formal offer and final pre-employment checks before joining the team.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity & Inclusion Statement**
 Neko Health is committed to inclusive hiring and member-first care. We welcome candidates from all backgrounds and encourage you to request reasonable adjustments to support your application.

title: Diagnostekniker
description:
**Om Carla**
 Vi på Carla vill sätta en ny standard för hur man köper bil. Vårt mål är att det ska vara lika lätt och tryggt att köpa eller leasa en bil online, som allt annat man köper på nätet. Självklart ska alla bilar vara laddbara. Bolaget grundades 2020 i Stockholm och är nu i en spännande tillväxtfas och letar därför efter en nya härlig kollegor till vår anläggning i Kungsängen.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 En tekniker eller mekaniker utför reparationer, service och felsökning av lätta fordon. Dessutom kräver dagens bilar att du är proffs på elektronik och felsökning. Arbetet kräver kunskap inom mekanik, elektronik och IT. Moderna fordon består av ett stort antal ihopkopplade datorer, därför måste fordonsmekaniker vara datorsmarta. Kundkontakter blir allt vanligare vilket ställer krav på social kompetens. Inom Carla finns goda utvecklingsmöjligheter för dig som tekniker. Exempelvis kan du vidareutbilda dig till Master Technician som kräver avancerad utbildning och gör att du jobbar med de mest avancerade bilarna.
   

  

**Arbetsuppgifter**
* Service
* Reparationer
* Felsökning
* Däckbyte
* Demontering och montering av karossdelar inför och efter lackeringsarbete


**Meriterande Egenskaper**
 Fordonselektronik
   

  

 Felsöknings-/reparationsvana
   

  

 Fordonsteknik
   

  

 Fordonstillbehör
   

  

 Mekaniska reparationsarbeten
   

  

 Felsökning
   

  

**Omfattning**
 Heltid, provanställning 6 månader
   

  

**Kvalifikationer**
* Har minst 5 års erfarenhet som fordonsmekaniker/tekniker
* Goda kunskaper inom fordonslitteratur/reparationsmetoder
* Mycket goda kunskaper inom felsökning av elsystem
* Har B-körkort
* Högvoltscertifikat är meriterande men inte ett måste


 Ort: Stockholm, Kungsängen.
   

  

**Vad har vi att erbjuda dig?**
 Först Och Främst, Så Erbjuder Vi En Fantastisk Möjlighet Att Ansluta Till Ett Bolag Som Bygger En Ny Onlinemarknad, Med Starka Värderingar, Och En Affärsmodell Som Ska Vara Hållbar På Alla Sätt. Utöver Det Så Erbjuder Vi
   

  

* En möjlighet att skapa din egen väg på ett relativt nystartat bolag, men med möjligheten att växa och lära från duktiga, och trevliga medarbetare
* Möjligheten att jobba smartare, snarare än mer. Att få en balans i livet är en viktig del i att skapa resultat över en längre tid
* En arbetsplats som på riktigt tror på mångfald. Vi har anställt, och fortsätter anställa helt oberoende av etnisk bakgrund, utbildning, erfarenhet, sexuell läggning, och allt annat som borde vara självklart 2024
* Konkurrenskraftig och marknadsmässig ersättning


**Nu när du kommit såhär långt...**
* så kanske just du är vår nya kollega? Se då till att ansök idag! Urval och rekryteringsprocess sker löpande, så sök så snart du kan!

title: Firmware Engineer
description:
**Mission**
 Neko Health exists to shift healthcare from treating illness to preventing it, using advanced, non‑invasive technology and clinical expertise to deliver early, actionable health insights.
   

  

 Neko Health is a Swedish healthcare technology company co-founded in 2018 by Hjalmar Nilsonne and Daniel Ek. Neko's vision is to shift healthcare from reactive treatment toward preventative health and early detection. This requires completely reimagining the patient's experience and incorporating the latest advances in sensors and AI.
   

  

 Neko Health has developed a new medical scanning technology concept to make it possible to do broad and non-invasive health data collection that is convenient and affordable for the public. The company is based in Stockholm, offering the Neko Body Scan experience at locations in Stockholm, London and Manchester, with over 500 employees.
   

  

 We’re building medical devices that enable large-scale, preventative healthcare. That means designing our own hardware, firmware, and software end-to-end — and running it in production, every day, in our clinics.
   

  

 We’re now looking for an experienced
 **Firmware Engineer** 
 to join our Hardware & Firmware team in Stockholm.
   

  

 This is a hands-on role for someone who enjoys working close to the metal, solving hard systems problems, and taking responsibility from early bring-up all the way to a deployed medical product.
   

  

 What you’ll do
   

  

* Develop embedded Linux firmware: bring-up, device drivers, platform features, and diagnostics
* Work close to hardware with sensors such as cameras and radar units
* Write efficient low-level code in C and C++
* Debug and root-cause complex hardware and software issues
* Optimize systems for performance, reliability, and resource efficiency
* Collaborate with electronics, systems, and software teams from concept to production
* Prototype, experiment, and tinker — we expect engineers to build and test, not just design


 Who you are
   

  

* You have 5+ years of relevant experience working with embedded systems
* You have a Master’s degree (or equivalent practical experience)
* You have extensive experience with embedded Linux development
* You’re highly proficient in C and/or C++
* You have deep knowledge of Linux internals (scheduler, memory management, concurrency, filesystems)
* You care deeply about performance, stability, and correctness
* You’re comfortable debugging in kernel context
* You’re hands-on by default — you like building things and making them work


 Nice to have
   

  

* Experience with RTOS-based firmware development
* Familiarity with electronics and hardware debugging tools (oscilloscopes, logic analyzers, etc.)
* Understanding of low-level communication protocols (UART, SPI, I²C, TCP/IP)
* Experience with the CUDA toolkit
* Background in medical devices or other regulated industries

title: Legal Engineer - Law Firms EMEA
description:
**About Us**
 Legora is on a mission: to redefine how legal work gets done. From the very start we have been very clear about the fact that we are not building a solution for lawyers, we are building it with them, because it is the only way to make sure it gets done the right way; working side-by-side every step of the way.
   

  

 Our AI-native workspace empowers legal professionals not just to work faster - but to ask better questions, unlock new insights. Every day, we push the boundaries of legal tech to make complex processes smarter, faster, and more human. From thousands of documents analysed in minutes to intelligent workflows designed in collaboration with leading practices, we’re turning possibility into reality.
   

  

 Today we are trusted by global firms like Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Bird & Bird and Linklaters in over 40 countries, but we have no plans on stopping here. We ship fast, we iterate effectively, and we scale rapidly - not by accident, but by design.
   

  

 When you join Legora, you become part of a team that believes "good enough" isn’t good enough and that the way to win is together, by empowering lawyers to do their best work with technology that truly understands them. If you’re excited by building from first principles, working with exceptional people, and accelerating change in a high-stakes, high-impact domain—then this is the moment and the place.
   

  

**We’re not just shaping the future of legal tech — we’re defining it. Ready to join us in building the intelligent future of law?**
**What You’ll Be Doing**
 Let's get the tricky part out of the way: this role doesn't fit neatly into a traditional box. It's part legal ops, part product specialist, part solutions architect, and part client whisperer. If you enjoy roles that stay static, this probably isn't it. Your mission is to help our clients, some of the most prestigious law firms in the world, get the absolute most out of our platform.
   

  

**Some Of What You'll Be Up To**
* Acting as a thought partner to law firm partners, associates, and innovation teams - building trusted relationships, addressing tricky pain points, and identifying high-value opportunities for them to scale their use of Legora across practice groups.
* Working together with Go To Market and Customer Success in taking full ownership of firm relationships - from running pilots with key practice areas, to onboarding new associates and partners, and ultimately guiding full-firm adoption across global law firms.
* Be the voice of law firm users inside Legora - sharing insights from M&A teams, litigation departments, and other practice groups that directly inform product development, roadmap priorities, and strategic direction.
* Delivering clear, confident product demos and training that bring the power of our platform to life - whether you're presenting to a single practice group or rolling out firm-wide.
* Documenting best practices from leading firms, contribute to the development of scalable playbooks, and help shape how we grow this function globally.
* Confidently helping law firms navigate one of the biggest shifts in how legal services are delivered - from evaluating the ROI and competitive advantage of AI to clearly mapping how AI will impact different practice areas, from corporate to disputes.


**What You Bring**
 You come from the world of Big Law; but you've never been content with how things have always been done. You may have trained and practised at a top-tier law firm, experiencing first-hand the pressures of billable hours, client demands, and operational inefficiencies. Perhaps you've moved into legal innovation, knowledge management, or legal tech within a firm. Maybe you've even left private practice to disrupt the status quo through a legal tech company, or ventures of your own. Either way, you know how law firms think, work, and (sometimes) struggle and you're ready to help them level up with technology.
   

  

**You'll Thrive In This Role If You**
* Have a background in law, with experience at a top-tier law firm - ideally across multiple practice areas or with exposure to firm-wide initiatives.
* Are tech-curious and product-savvy. Not necessarily a coder, but passionate about navigating technical conversations, especially around things like generative AI, technology implementation, innovation and productivity.
* Communicate clearly and confidently with diverse stakeholders, from senior partners to graduate trainees, and from lawyers to engineers. I.e. translating across disciplines is second nature to you.
* Bring structure to ambiguity and energy to complexity; and enjoy being the calm, credible presence in a fast-moving environment.
* Understand how to evaluate and improve existing processes as a direct result of new and emerging technologies - whether that's streamlining due diligence, contract review, or legal research.
* Are proactive, self-directed, and comfortable juggling multiple firm relationships at once.
* Care deeply about quality, but don't get stuck in perfectionism - you get things done, and you make them better over time.
* Understand the commercial realities of law firm life: billing pressures, client expectations, competitive positioning, and the delicate balance between innovation and risk management.


**A few more things**
 We're a fast-growing company with bold ambitions, so you'll be joining at a time when things are moving quickly - in the best possible way. You'll have a lot of autonomy, a lot of responsibility, and the chance to genuinely shape how this function evolves. Everyone here has a founder-mentality.
   

  

 If that sounds exciting rather than terrifying, we'd love to hear from you.
   

  

**Legora is an Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Legora, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

description:

**Northern Sweden**
 At
 **Stryker** 
 , we are driven to make healthcare better.
   

  

 We are now looking for a commercially strong, structured and ambitious
   

  

 Territory Manager to take ownership of our Visualization & Communication portfolio in Northern / Southern Sweden. This is a high-impact role with full territory responsibility in a market that rewards resilience, strategic thinking and strong relationship-building.
   

  

**Visualization & Communication portfolio:** 
 Endoscopy | Stryker
   

  

**Your Mission**
 You will drive sales and market development of our Visualization & Communication portfolio across your territory. From operating theatres to procurement offices, from clinical workshops to contract negotiations you will own the full sales cycle.
   

  

**What You Will Be Responsible For**
* Taking full ownership of your territory and sales targets.
* Building and maintaining strong relationships with surgeons, theatre staff, hospital administration and procurement.
* Driving and managing complex tender processes (framework and volume-based agreements).
* Implementing marketing and sales strategies aligned with Nordic objectives.
* Conducting impactful product demonstrations in OR settings and clinical workshops.
* Advising and training surgical staff on product use.
* Preparing and managing orders, ensuring seamless follow-up and high customer satisfaction.
* Representing Stryker at congresses, trade fairs and professional meetings to expand your network and identify new business opportunities.


 You will start with an intensive onboarding and product training phase to ensure you are fully equipped to succeed.
   

  

**The Profile We Are Looking For**
 This role requires more than enthusiasm for the OR. It demands commercial maturity and structure.
   

  

 You bring:
   

  

* 4+ years of sales experience within medical devices, pharmaceutical or a comparable healthcare industry.
* Strong understanding of the Swedish healthcare landscape.
* Experience working in tender-driven environments (highly preferred).
* A University degree in medical technology, health management, business, science or a technical field.
* A passion for selling complex products and delivering high-level customer service.
* The ability to balance relationship-building with disciplined administrative execution.
* A valid driving license.
* Fluent Swedish and strong English skills (written and spoken).


 Endoscopy experience is an advantage, but a proven sales mindset in healthcare is more critical.
   

  

**What Makes This Role Unique**
* Full ownership of a strategically important territory.
* Opportunity to grow a market with strong future potential.
* Exposure to key opinion leaders and hospital decision-makers.
* A structured, world-class product portfolio with strong brand recognition.
* A competitive compensation package including base salary and commission.


 Stryker is a global leader in medical technologies and, together with its customers, is driven to make healthcare better. The company offers innovative products and services in MedSurg, Neurotechnology, Orthopaedics and Spine that help improve patient and healthcare outcomes. Alongside its customers around the world, Stryker impacts more than 150 million patients annually.

description:
Are you ready for the next step in your SAP career? Do you want to work in a flexible environment with exciting assignments. We are now looking for SAP Enterprise Architect who wants to help shape the solutions of the future.
   

  

 Welcome to CGI!
   

  

 Your future duties and responsibilities
   

  

 As an SAP Enterprise Architect, you will play a key role in our deliveries to clients across various industries such as Insurance, Manufacturing, Retail and Utilities.
   

  

 Your responsibilities will include:
   

  

* Optimize technical solutions for our customers' business strategies
* Translate our customers' business requirements into sustainable technical solutions and act as a bridge between IT and Business
* Lead / Participate in pre-studies, requirements analysis, and solution design together with clients and project teams
* Design and develop SAP Architecture for transformation programs
* Drive architecture governance, standards, roadmaps and innovation internally as well as externally with customers in their transformation programs
* Advisory services and acting as an expert in projects and application management
* Ensure alignment across functional, technical, integration, and data designs in projects and application management
* Collaboration with SAP and other software technology partners
* Support leadership internally as well as with customers in architectural risk assessment and mitigation
* Mentor younger colleagues


**Required Qualifications To Be Successful In This Role**
* Strategic mindset with ability to optimize technical solutions for our customers' business strategies
* Ability to translate business requirements into sustainable technical solutions and act as a bridge between IT and Business
* Strong communication and stakeholder management skills
* Experienced working in complex project environments
* Strong leader with excellent cross-functional collaboration skills
* Enjoy complex problem solving and challenging yourself
* Thorough and meticulous, always striving to deliver your best
* Supportive team player that also enjoys mentoring younger colleagues
* Strong ability to work independently
* Fluency in Swedish and English, both spoken and written.


 Technical skills:
   

  

* 15+ years of SAP Architecture experience
* Hands-on S/4HANA Solution Architect experience
* Strong knowledge of S/4HANA architecture, deployment models, and integration patterns as well as SAP Activate, Clean Core, and extensibility concepts
* Experienced in SAP ERP transformations (preferably S/4HANA migrations).
* Deep knowledge of data strategy, master data governance on SAP HANA.
* Experience of SAP BTP and Analytics is a plus
* Knowledge of enterprise architecture frameworks and/or solution technology frameworks such as TOGAF, ArchiMate, ITIL, COBIT is beneficial.


**Want to Learn More?**
 We look forward to hearing from you! Applications will be reviewed continuously, and the position may be filled before the final application deadline. For further questions, please feel free to send your inquiries to Santosh Nimbhorkar, santosh.nimbhorkar@cgi.com
   

  

**Together, as owners, let’s turn meaningful insights into action.**
 Life at CGI is rooted in ownership, teamwork, respect and belonging. Here, you’ll reach your full potential because…
   

  

 You are invited to be an owner from day 1 as we work together to bring our Dream to life. That’s why we call ourselves CGI Partners rather than employees. We benefit from our collective success and actively shape our company’s strategy and direction.
   

  

 Your work creates value. You’ll develop innovative solutions and build relationships with teammates and clients while accessing global capabilities to scale your ideas, embrace new opportunities, and benefit from expansive industry and technology expertise.
   

  

 You’ll shape your career by joining a company built to grow and last. You’ll be supported by leaders who care about your health and well-being and provide you with opportunities to deepen your skills and broaden your horizons.
   

  

 Come join our team—one of the largest IT and business consulting services firms in the world.

title: Named Hunter Enterprise Account Executive (Nordics)
description:
SLSQ227R48

 Want to help solve the world's toughest problems with data and AI? This is what we do every day at Databricks.
